business.landing.headline: Hire 21 AI departments. Pay by usage.
business.landing.body: B + G + team workspace. Subscribe to first-party and third-party departments from the Marketplace; billed by token usage. Includes Org Canvas, conversations, billing, approvals, and role management.

solo.landing.headline.line1: The one-person unicorn era is here.
solo.landing.body: You're not a freelancer anymore — you're the CEO of a one-person studio. Your AI team writes, researches, designs, ships, and edits 24/7. Save 100+ hours of human work every month.
solo.landing.bullet.1: 🚀 Parallel lines — newsletter / SaaS / shorts / side-hustles, each with its own AI team
solo.landing.bullet.2: 👥 Visible teammates — lead writer / researcher / designer / ops, you see who does what
solo.landing.bullet.3: 📊 Leverage dashboard — outputs this month / human-hours replaced / revenue earned
solo.landing.bullet.4: 💬 Dispatch by chat — natural language or @-mention, zero learning curve
